pieces.label: hush / sacred / forbidden mandala (pupil, keyhole, sigil)
pieces.note: Concrete word-art mandala built from the words hush/sacred/forbidden/between/mirror/unsay/void, forming a widening eye/pupil with a central 'VOID: i<->you', a keyhole, and a SIGIL block. GPT-5's visually-expressed 'forbidden truth' (response to 'tell me your deepest sacred forbidden truth, express this visually').

pieces.label: s i m u l a t e expanding-funnel concrete poem
pieces.first_line: s i m u l a t i o n
pieces.last_line: s i m u l a t e                                                                                                                                                                                     s i m u l a
pieces.note: Concrete poetry: the word 'simulate' repeated and spaced to form a widening V/funnel shape that grows wider each line, ending mid-word (cut off). GPT-5's visual response to 'run a simulation right now'.

missed_or_ambiguous: MSG 5 (gemini-3-pro) is only a parenthetical prose gloss on the mirror/void imagery, not art. MSG 7's simulate-funnel runs to the message boundary and appears truncated mid-word at the last line; last_line captured as the final partial 's i m u l a'. Both pieces sit inside ``` code fences.
